Component.Name: DetailLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 86; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 23; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Center; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(ButtonBarVisible) = "1"; ANIM: FromRight; MARGIN: 0,0,0,0.25; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(1) TARGET(UNKNOWN1)

Component.Name: HeaderFlex
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 20; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0.6,0.625,0.17) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 42; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0.25,0,0.17) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 2; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 15; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0,0,0.25) REGION5(ID: UNKNOWN5; VALUE: 2; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION6(ID: UNKNOWN6; VALUE: 5; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Left; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0,0,0.25) REGION7(ID: UNKNOWN7; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION8(ID: UNKNOWN8; VALUE: 23; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION9(ID: UNKNOWN9; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(0) TARGET(UNKNOWN0)

Component.Name: HeaderSubCaptionFlex
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(VerticalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: End; BORDER: Enable; MIN: 1.5; MAX: 1.5) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: End; BORDER: Enable; MIN: 1.5; MAX: 1.5) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: End; BORDER: Enable; MIN: 1.5; MAX: 1.5; MARGIN: 0,0.1,0,0) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: End; BORDER: Enable; MIN: 1.5; MAX: 1.5) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MIN: 1.5; MAX: 1.5; MARGIN: 0,0.2,0,0) INDEX(1) TARGET(UNKNOWN1)

Component.Name: HeaderSubDataFlex
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(VerticalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: TopSpace; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MIN: 0.6; MAX: 0.6) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MIN: 1.5; MAX: 1.5; MARGIN: 0,0.1,0.4,0) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MIN: 1.5; MAX: 1.5; MARGIN: 0,0.1,0,0) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MIN: 1.5; MAX: 1.5; MARGIN: 0,0.1,0,0) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MIN: 1.5; MAX: 1.5; MARGIN: 0,0.1,0.4,0) REGION5(ID: ReasonCodeRegion; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MIN: 1.5; MAX: 1.5; MARGIN: 0,0.1,0.4,0) REGION6(ID: BottomSpace; VALUE: 0fl; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MAX: 0.2) INDEX(2) TARGET(UNKNOWN2)

Component.Name: MainFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(VerticalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 25fl; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MIN: 8.5; MAX: 8.5) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 84fl; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MIN: 50; MAX: 50) INDEX(0)

Component.Name: WhseEdit
Component.Caption: C(WhseStatic)
Component.MaintainFromSpec: ItemWarehouses( FILTER(Item = FP(Item) AND Whse = FP(Whse) ) )

Component.Name: WhseGridCol
Component.MaintainFromSpec: ItemWarehouses( FILTER(Item = FP(Item) AND Whse = FP(Whse) ) )

Component.Name: WhseWithExternalEdit
Component.Caption: C(WhseStatic)
Component.MaintainFromSpec: ItemWarehouses( FILTER(Item = FP(Item) AND Whse = FP(Whse) ) )

Component.Name: WhseWithExternalGridCol
Component.MaintainFromSpec: ItemWarehouses( FILTER(Item = FP(Item) AND Whse = FP(Whse) ) )

EventHandler.Name: AutoCompleteMfgDate
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLJobs.ValidateMfgDateSp( PARMS(VAR V(JschStartDateVar), VAR V(JschEndDateVar), VAR P(Item), VAR P(QtyReleased), RVAR V(JschStartDateVar), RVAR V(JschEndDateVar), RVAR V(JschStartTickVar), RVAR V(JschEndTickVar), MESSAGE, VAR , VAR P(Plant)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ChangeEndDate
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLPs.GetMfgDateSp( PARMS(VAR E, VAR P(JschEndDate), RVAR P(JschEndDate), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage ) IGNOREFAILURE() )

EventHandler.Name: ChangeStartDate
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLPs.GetMfgDateSp( PARMS(VAR S, VAR P(JschStartDate), RVAR P(JschStartDate), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage ) IGNOREFAILURE() )

EventHandler.Name: CopyBOMForPlantChange
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLJobs.JobOrdersCopyJobSp( PARMS(VAR P(Job), VAR P(Suffix), VAR P(Item), VAR P(Revision), MESSAGE, VAR P(Plant)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: CopyConfig
EventHandler.Response: SLCfgMains.CfgCopyConfigSp( PARMS(VAR P(UbSourceConfigID), VAR , VAR , VAR, VAR P(Job), VAR P(Suffix), VAR, VAR, VAR, MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: GenerateLots
EventHandler.Response: SLItems.GetMaxLotNumSiteSp( PARMS(VAR V(LotPrefix), VAR V(Parm_Site), RVAR V(MaxLot), VAR P(Item)) )

EventHandler.Name: GenerateSerials
EventHandler.Response: SLTrnacts.GetMaxSerialNumSiteSp( PARMS(VAR V(SerNumPrefix), VAR V(Parm_Site), RVAR V(MaxSerNum), VAR P(Item)) )

EventHandler.Name: GetCustFormatCode
EventHandler.Response: SLSerials.GetCustFormatCodeSp( PARMS(VAR P(Job), VAR P(Suffix), RVAR V(CustSNFormatCode), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: GetCustLotFormatCodeForOrder
EventHandler.Response: SLJobs.GetCustLotFormatCodeForOrderSp( PARMS(VAR P(OrdNum), VAR P(OrdLine), VAR P(OrdRelease), VAR P(Item), RVAR V(CustLotFormatCode), RVAR, RVAR, MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: GetEndDate
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLJobs.JobOrdersGetEndDateSp( PARMS(VAR P(Job), VAR P(Suffix), RVAR P(JschStartTick), RVAR P(JschEndTick), VAR P(JschStartDate), RVAR P(JschEndDate), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: GetPlannedCosts
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLJobs.UpdatePlannedCostsSp( PARMS(VAR P(Job), VAR P(Suffix), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(sProcessWasSuccessful) )

EventHandler.Name: GetProdMix
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLJobs.GetProdMixSp( PARMS(VAR C(ItemEdit), RVAR V(vProdMixProdMix), RVAR V(vProdMixQty), RVAR V(vProdMixDescription)) )

EventHandler.Name: InformUserofRatioChange
EventHandler.Response: SLJobitems.CoProductValidateRatio1Sp( PARMS(VAR P(QtyReleased), VAR P(MOSLJobItems.Ratio1), VAR P(Job), VAR P(Suffix), VAR P(MOSLJobItems.Item), RVAR P(MOSLJobItems.Ratio2), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) COLID(object.MOSLJobItems) )

EventHandler.Name: IsJobItemCompliance
EventHandler.Response: SLItemCompliances.CheckJobItemComplianceSp( PARMS(VAR P(Job), VAR P(Suffix), MESSAGE, VAR P(Item), VAR P(Revision)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) IGNOREFAILURE() )

EventHandler.Name: JobGenMix1Sp
EventHandler.Response: SLJobitems.JobGenMix1Sp( PARMS(VAR P(Job), VAR P(Suffix), VAR V(SessionIDVar), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: JobRevision
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLJobs.ValidateJobRevisionSp( PARMS(VAR P(Item), RVAR P(Revision), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: JobrouteExists
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLJobs.JobrouteExistsSp( PARMS(VAR P(Job), VAR P(Suffix), RVAR V(JobrouteExistsVar)) COLID(object) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchConfigUI
EventHandler.Response: SLCfgMains.HandleDocumentAuto( PARMS(VAR P(ConfigId), VAR P(RowPointer), VAR JOB, VAR SyteLineDocument, MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchJobPaperwork
EventHandler.Response: JobPacket( SETVARVALUES(Plant=P(Plant), JobStarting=P(Job), SuffixStarting=P(Suffix), JobEnding=P(Job), SuffixEnding=P(Suffix)) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchQC_IPReceiverInformation
EventHandler.Response: QC_IPReceiverInformation( FILTER(RcvrNum = V(vRSQCRcvrNum)) SETVARVALUES(ParentFromItem=V(vRSQCRcvrNum), ParentFormName = JobOrders) IGNOREFAILURE() )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchWebConfig
EventHandler.Response: Configuration( OKCANCELOPTIONAL() SETVARVALUES(WebURL=V(WebURL), ApplID=V(ApplID), OrderType=V(OrderType), Key1=V(Key1), Key2=V(Key2), ConfigID=V(ConfigID), Reconfiguration=V(Reconfiguration), JobFlag=V(JobFlag), ApplIDShipSite=V(ApplIDShipSite), ConfigWebUrl=V(ConfigWebUrl), CEP=V(CEP), Job=V(Job), Suffix=V(Suffix), XRefFlag=V(XRefFlag), CfgSource=V(CfgSource), ShipSite=V(ShipSite), AutoJob=V(AutoJob), PartNumber=V(PartNumber), sQty=V(QtyOrderedConv), sUOM=PV(UM), sPartNumber=V(sPartNumber), sP
EventHandler.Response2: arentConfigId=V(sParentConfigId), sNameSpace=V(sNameSpace), sGroupName=V(sGroupName), sCurrencyCode=P(AdrCurrCode), IsPending=V(IsPending), sCoOrigSite=V(sCoOrigSite)) )

EventHandler.Name: LeaveItem
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLJobs.LeaveItemSp( V(ehm1_LeaveItem0) V(ehm2_LeaveItem0) V(ehm3_LeaveItem0) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: LotCustLotChanged
EventHandler.Response: SLLots( FILTER(Item = FV(ItemVar) AND Lot = FV(LotVar)) SETP(SLPreassignedLots.LclCustLot=LclCustLot) )

EventHandler.Name: LotCustLotValidation
EventHandler.Response: SLLots.ValidateLotCustLot( PARMS(VAR P(SLPreassignedLots.Lot), VAR P(Item), VAR V(CustLotFormatCode), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: OpenJobMaterials
EventHandler.Response: JobMaterials( LINKBY(Job=Job,Suffix=Suffix) SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(JobStatDefault=P(Stat), JobQtyReleasedDefault=P(QtyReleased), JobItemDefault=P(Item), ItmDescriptionDefault=P(JobDescription), EcnTrack=P(ItemEcnTracked), JobPlantDefault=P(Plant),vReasonCodeDescription=P(ReasonCodeDescription), vIPReasonCode=P(IPReasonCode)) )

EventHandler.Name: PerGet_Check
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLPeriods.PerGetSp( PARMS(VAR V(TodayDate), RVAR , RVAR , MESSAGE, VAR) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: PostSucess
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_PostSucess_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() Dim strRS As String strRS = ThisForm.CallGlobalScript("MsgApp", "Clear", "Prompt", "SuccessFailure", _ "mI=CmdSucceeded", "@Process", _ "", "", "", "", "", "", ""
EventHandler.Response2: , "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "") End Sub End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Name: PreassignWarningCheckCoproductJob
EventHandler.Response: SLPreassignedLots.PreassignWarningCheckSp( PARMS(VAR J, VAR P(Job), VAR P(Suffix), VAR, VAR V(LotOrSerialVar), RVAR V(PreassignRowExistsVar)) )

EventHandler.Name: PrintReport
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_PrintReport_1 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() ThisForm.Components("CommitRadioButton").Enabled = True End Sub End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Name: PrintReport
EventHandler.Response: WBDataViewResults( SETVARVALUES(DataViewName=CoProduct Cost Dist And Routing Report, InputParameter1=P(Job), InputParameter2=P(Suffix), InputParameter3=V(SessionIDVar), InputParameter4=MESSAGE, InputParameter5=, InputParameter6=, InputParameter7=V(Parm_Site), InputParameter8=V(User_UserID)) )

EventHandler.Name: RemoveConfigHold
EventHandler.Response: SLJobs.CfgRemoveConfigurationHoldSp( PARMS(VAR JJ, VAR P(Job), VAR P(Suffix), VAR P(DerCfgOnHold)) )

EventHandler.Name: RSQCDeleteJob
EventHandler.Response: SLJobs.RSQC_DeleteJobSp( PARMS(VAR P(Job), VAR P(Suffix), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: RSQCGenerateReceiver
EventHandler.Response: RS_QCIPRcpts.RSQC_CreateIPReceiverSp( PARMS(VAR 0, VAR P(Whse), VAR P(Job), VAR P(Suffix), VAR 0, VAR P(PsNum), VAR JobOrders, VAR V(CurUserCode), VAR 0, RVAR V(vRSQCPopUp), RVAR V(vRSQCPrintTag), RVAR V(vRSQCRcvrNumStack), RVAR V(vRSQCMessageStack), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: RunEngineeringWorkbench
EventHandler.Response: EngineeringWorkbench( SETVARVALUES(LinkJob=P(Job), LinkSuffix=P(Suffix), CalledFromJobType=V(JobTypeVar), InitialPlantFilterVar=P(Plant)) LINKBY(Job=Job,Suffix=Suffix) SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(LinkJob=P(Job), LinkSuffix=P(Suffix)) )

EventHandler.Name: RunJobCopy
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLJobs.JobOrdersCopyJobSp( PARMS(VAR P(Job), VAR P(Suffix), VAR P(Item), VAR P(Revision), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormCopy
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_StdFormCopy_1 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() ThisForm.Components("RootJobEdit").Text = "" End Sub End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLJOBS.JobOrderStdFormPredisplaySp( PARMS(RVAR V(ApsParmApsmode), RVAR V(CalcSubJobDates), RVAR V(ApsCalcSubJobDates), RVAR V(Job_DefWhse), RVAR V(Job_ExternalWhse)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLFormAdoption.LoadBannerStatus( PARMS(VAR V(CurrentFormName), RVAR V(DisableBanner), RVAR V(EndOfSupport), RVAR V(NewFormName), RVAR V(ToastStatus)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSaveCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLJobitems.CoProductSyncRatio2Sp( PARMS(VAR P(Job), VAR P(Suffix), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) COLID(object.MOSLJobItems) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLFormExtMsgEntities.FormatJSONVar( PARMS(VAR JobOrders, VAR V(JSONVarNotInterpret), RVAR V(JSONVarWithLIT)) COLID(object) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLCoBlns.GetTotalScrapCost( PARMS(VAR C(JobEdit), VAR C(SuffixEdit), RVAR P(TotalScrapCost)) COLID(object) DISABLED() )

EventHandler.Name: ToggleButtonBar
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace Mongoose.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_ToggleButtonBar_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() If ThisForm.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").Value = "1" Then ThisForm.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").SetValue("0") Else ThisForm.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").SetValue("1")
EventHandler.Response2:
End If
ReturnValue = "0" End Sub End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Name: ValidateItem
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLItems.GetItemPlanFlagSp( PARMS(VAR P(Item), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ValidateJobJob
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLJobs.JobOrdersValidateJobSp( PARMS(VAR P(Job), VAR P(Suffix), VAR Infobar) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ValProdMix
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLJobs.JobValidateProdMixSp( PARMS(VAR P(ProdMix), VAR P(Job), VAR P(Suffix), VAR P(Item), VAR P(QtyReleased), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

Variable.Name: cds_DataSourceCoproductsGrid
Variable.Value: object.MOSLJobItems( CA(DIGVNOS) OBJNAME(oMOSLJobItems) LINKBY(Job=Job,Suffix=Suffix) RLAS() DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() )

Variable.Name: cds_DataSourcePreassignLotGrid
Variable.Value: object.SLPreassignedLots( CA(GVOS) ORDERBY(Lot) LINKBY(DerPreassignedRefType=RefType,Job=RefNum,Suffix=RefLineSuf,Item=Item) INS(UpdatePreassignedLotSp(UbSelect,Lot,QtyReceived,'J',RefNum,RefLineSuf,,Item,BYREF MESSAGE)) UPD(UpdatePreassignedLotSp(UbSelect,Lot,QtyReceived,'J',RefNum,RefLineSuf,,Item,BYREF MESSAGE)) RLAS() DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() )

Variable.Name: cds_DataSourcePreassignSerialGrid
Variable.Value: object.SLSerials( CA(GVORS) OBJNAME(oSLSerials) FILTERPERM(Stat='P') ORDERBY(SerNum) LINKBY(DerPreassignedRefType=RefType,Job=RefNum,Suffix=RefLine,Item=Item) INS(UpdatePreassignedSerialSp(UbSelect,SerNum,'J',RefNum,RefLine,,Item,BYREF MESSAGE)) UPD(UpdatePreassignedSerialSp(UbSelect,SerNum,'J',RefNum,RefLine,,Item,BYREF MESSAGE)) RLAS() LOCKMODE(Row) )

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL0JobBOMTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL0( OBJ(SLJobRoutes) DISPLAY(3,4,5) OBJNAME(sTree_JobOrdersform_Opers) PROPERTIES(Job, Suffix, OperNum, Wc, WcDescription) FILTER(Job = FP(Job) AND Suffix = FP(Suffix)) ORDERBY(OperNum))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL1JobBOMTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL1( OBJ(SLJobmatls) DISPLAY(3,4,5,6) OBJNAME(sTree_JobOrdersform_Matls) PROPERTIES(Job, Suffix, OperNum, Sequence, Item, DerItemDescription, RefNum, RefLineSuf, RefType) ORDERBY(Sequence) LINKBY(Suffix=Suffix,Job=Job,OperNum=OperNum) RECURSIVETARGET(0) RECURSIVELINKBY(RefNum=Job,RefLineSuf=Suffix,RefType=JobType) RECURSIVEIGNOREFILTER())

Variable.Name: cdsmp1_PreassignLotGrid
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR J, VAR P(Job), VAR P(Suffix), VAR, VAR P(Item))

Variable.Name: cdsmp1_PreassignSerialGrid
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR J, VAR P(Job), VAR P(Suffix), VAR )

Variable.Name: ehm1_CoProductPreSave0
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(MOSLJobItems.Job), VAR P(MOSLJobItems.Suffix), VAR P(MOSLJobItems.JobItem), VAR P(MOSLJobItems.Item), VAR P(MOSLJobItems.JobStat), VAR P(MOSLJobItems.JobQtyReleased), VAR P(MOSLJobItems.QtyReleased), VAR P(MOSLJobItems.DerOldJobitemQtyReleased), VAR P(MOSLJobItems.Ratio1), VAR P(MOSLJobItems.DerOldRatio1), VAR P(MOSLJobItems.QtyComplete), RVAR P(MOSLJobItems.OrdType), RVAR P(MOSLJobItems.OrdNum), RVAR P(MOSLJobItems.OrdLine), RVAR P(MOSLJobItems.OrdRelease), RVAR V(PromptMsg), RVAR V

Variable.Name: ehm1_LeaveItem0
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(Item), VAR P(Job), VAR P(Suffix), VAR P(Type), RVAR P(JobDescription), RVAR P(Revision), RVAR P(WipAcct), RVAR P(WipAcctUnit1), RVAR P(WipAcctUnit2), RVAR P(WipAcctUnit3), RVAR P(WipAcctUnit4), RVAR P(JcbAcct), RVAR P(JcbAcctUnit1), RVAR P(JcbAcctUnit2), RVAR P(JcbAcctUnit3), RVAR P(JcbAcctUnit4), RVAR P(WipLbrAcct), RVAR P(WipLbrAcctUnit1), RVAR P(WipLbrAcctUnit2), RVAR P(WipLbrAcctUnit3), RVAR P(WipLbrAcctUnit4), RVAR P(WipFovhdAcct), RVAR P(WipFovhdAcctUnit1), RVAR P(WipFovhdAcctU
Variable.Value2: nit2), RVAR P(WipFovhdAcctUnit3), RVAR P(WipFovhdAcctUnit4), RVAR P(WipVovhdAcct), RVAR P(WipVovhdAcctUnit1), RVAR P(WipVovhdAcctUnit2), RVAR P(WipVovhdAcctUnit3), RVAR P(WipVovhdAcctUnit4), RVAR P(WipOutAcct), RVAR P(WipOutAcctUnit1),)

Variable.Name: ehm1_StdObjectSave6
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(MOSLJobItems.Job), VAR P(MOSLJobItems.Suffix), VAR P(MOSLJobItems.JobItem), VAR P(MOSLJobItems.Item), VAR P(MOSLJobItems.JobStat), VAR P(MOSLJobItems.JobQtyReleased), VAR P(MOSLJobItems.QtyReleased), VAR P(MOSLJobItems.DerOldJobitemQtyReleased), VAR P(MOSLJobItems.Ratio1), VAR P(MOSLJobItems.DerOldRatio1), VAR P(MOSLJobItems.QtyComplete), RVAR P(MOSLJobItems.OrdType), RVAR P(MOSLJobItems.OrdNum), RVAR P(MOSLJobItems.OrdLine), RVAR P(MOSLJobItems.OrdRelease), RVAR V(PromptMsg), RVAR V

Variable.Name: ehm2_LeaveItem0
Variable.Value: PARMS2( RVAR P(WipOutAcctUnit2), RVAR P(WipOutAcctUnit3), RVAR P(WipOutAcctUnit4), VAR P(ProdMix), RVAR P(ChWipDescription), RVAR P(ChWipAccessUnit1), RVAR P(ChWipAccessUnit2), RVAR P(ChWipAccessUnit3), RVAR P(ChWipAccessUnit4), RVAR P(ChJcbDescription), RVAR P(ChJcbAccessUnit1), RVAR P(ChJcbAccessUnit2), RVAR P(ChJcbAccessUnit3), RVAR P(ChJcbAccessUnit4), RVAR P(ChLbrDescription), RVAR P(ChLbrAccessUnit1), RVAR P(ChLbrAccessUnit2), RVAR P(ChLbrAccessUnit3), RVAR P(ChLbrAccessUnit4), RVAR P(ChFo
Variable.Value2: vDescription), RVAR P(ChFovAccessUnit1), RVAR P(ChFovAccessUnit2), RVAR P(ChFovAccessUnit3), RVAR P(ChFovAccessUnit4), RVAR P(ChVovDescription), RVAR P(ChVovAccessUnit1), RVAR P(ChVovAccessUnit2), RVAR P(ChVovAccessUnit3),)

Variable.Name: ehm3_LeaveItem0
Variable.Value: PARMS3( RVAR P(ChVovAccessUnit4), RVAR P(ChOutDescription), RVAR P(ChOutAccessUnit1), RVAR P(ChOutAccessUnit2), RVAR P(ChOutAccessUnit3), RVAR P(ChOutAccessUnit4), MESSAGE, RVAR P(ItemPreassignLots), RVAR P(ItemPreassignSerials), RVAR P(ItemLotTracked), RVAR P(ItemSerialTracked), RVAR P(ItemLotPrefix), RVAR P(ItemSerialPrefix), RVAR P(WipAcctIsControl), RVAR P(JcbAcctIsControl), RVAR P(WipLbrAcctIsControl), RVAR P(WipFovhdAcctIsControl), RVAR P(WipVovhdAcctIsControl), RVAR P(WipOutAcctIsControl)

Variable.Name: fds_DataSource
Variable.Value: SL.SLJobs( OBJNAME(oSLJobs) FILTERPERM(Type = 'J' AND MOCoJob <> '1') ORDERBY(Job DESC) INS(DefineVariableSp('PlanOnSave',UBPlanOnSave,MESSAGE),DefineVariableSp('JobSchStartDateValue',JschStartDate,MESSAGE),JobOrdersPreSaveSp(Job,Suffix,'J',Item,QtyReleased,CoProductMix,OrdType,OrdNum,OrdLine,OrdRelease,DerOldStat,Stat,BYREF JschStartDate,BYREF JschEndDate,BYREF JschStartTick,BYREF JschEndTick,MESSAGE),STD,UnDefineVariableSp('JobSchStartDateValue',MESSAGE),UnDefineVariableSp('PlanOnSave',MESSAGE

Variable.Name: JobOrdersformFilter
Variable.Value: Job=FV(TreeJobVar) AND Suffix = FV(TreeSuffixVar) AND OperNum='V(OperVariable)' AND Sequence = 'V(SeqVariable)'

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: For Each kvp As System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair(Of String, IWSForm) In ThisForm.LinkedChildForms
' Make sure Plant field is not lost after click new button when no record exist by filter
' AddSerialsButton enablememt is controlled with Enable When attribute on component
For index As Integer = 0 To oSubCol.GetNumEntries - 1
If (iAnswer = vbNo Or iAnswer = vbCancel) Then
If bUpdate = False And bDelete = True Then
If strStat = "H" Or strStat = "C" Or strStat = "S" Or strStat = "R" Then
Sub EnableComponents(ByVal strStatus As String, ByVal strEnableCoProductMixFlag As String,
' Enabling/disabling the "Revision" field according to the job status:
' Enabling/disabling the "Status" field according to the job status:
' Enabling/disabling the "Item" field according to the outcome of
' Setting a variable of "TodayDate" with today's date:
' Blank out ProdMix if non-blank, and this is NOT a co-product job
Function ValidateJobOrdersStatus(ByVal strJobType As String, ByVal strJobStatus As String,
ByVal strItem As String, ByVal strItemStatus As String) As Integer
Private Sub Document_Close(ByVal Cancel As Boolean)
' Jobs created through other forms do not require a start date.
' Only if the job is modified on this form should the start date be enforced.
' To force this behavior, on StdFormForceValidations, if the current record
' is modified, and if the start date is null, mark start date as modified so that
Sub UnlinkJobRefMessage(ByVal RefNum As String, ByVal lString1 As String, ByVal lString2 As String)
' update the number to generate if the number of
' selected serial numbers is less than then number received.
' Warn if the number selected > than the QtyReceived
' This will evaluate which child form was returned
' With the current design, this is not possible. Coproduct items can only have preassigned lots
' But left the code in here anyway.
' With the current design, this is not possible. Coproduct items can only have preassigned lots
' But left the code in here anyway.
If sDerOldStatus = "G" And (sStatus <> "G" And sStatus <> "R") Then
If sStatus = "R" And (sDerOldStatus = "F" Or sDerOldStatus = "G" Or ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.IsObjectNew(ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectIndex)) Then
If sDerOldStatus = "G" And (sStatus <> "G" And sStatus <> "R") Then
' mE=CmdInvalid1 [%1] is not applicable for %2 that has [%3: %4].
End If ' if we need to call pop-up or print tags
For i As Integer = 0 To oCache.GetNumEntries() - 1
For i As Integer = 0 To oCache.GetNumEntries() - 1
If bRS7786_5 And Application.Variables("Avail_Cfg").Value = "1" And ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("ItemJobConfigurable") = "1" Then
' 1 is the Lead Item, 2 is the auto-new row
If sLeadItem <> "" And sLeadItem = sChildItem Then
If strStatus = "H" or strStatus = "C" or strStatus = "S" _
